message:
feat(net): add reactor integration to UdpSocket and vectored I/O support

- Rewrite UdpSocket to use reactor-based wakeup instead of Phase 0 busy-loops
- Add IoRegistration field and register_interest() method following TcpStream pattern
- Change async methods to &mut self for registration updates
- Add poll_* methods: poll_send_to, poll_recv_from, poll_send, poll_recv, poll_peek_from
- Add AsyncReadVectored trait with default implementation
- Add AsyncReadVectoredExt extension trait with read_vectored() method
- Implement AsyncReadVectored for TcpStream and UnixStream
- Add poll_write_vectored to AsyncWrite trait implementations
- Fix test import ambiguities in unix/stream.rs using fully qualified syntax

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
